packages.name: Demo Sidecar
packages.summary: A no-op sidecar package used as a kernel smoke fixture.

packages.name: Iyke Routes Demo
packages.summary: Registers two example /pkg/com.example.iyke/ HTTP routes (echo + event).

packages.name: Cron Tick Demo
packages.summary: Fires a `pkg://cron-tick` event every second to verify the cron registry.

packages.name: Tasks
packages.summary: Master-detail Tasks UI — first real-feature kernel migration. Marker install: TanStack file-router still serves the route from src/routes/tasks; manifest declares ownership and registries (ui_routes, permissions, queries, settings) fire.

packages.name: Iframe App Smoke Fixture
packages.summary: MCP App smoke fixture — exercises the iframe mount path end-to-end (pkg_content URL → AppBridge handshake → tools/call → uninstall 404). Uses @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps as the in-iframe client.

packages.name: HyperFrames
packages.summary: Per-project HyperFrames preview, served as a pkg. Wrapper UI lists projects from $HYPERFRAMES_PROJECTS_DIR; selecting one boots a per-slug Vite preview server (cap 4 concurrent) and embeds it in a nested iframe.
